tasks.title: Repo scaffold: Xcode project, FaveOffRanking package skeleton, .storekit config, PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy stub, bootstrap spike tests
acceptance_criteria: Clean checkout builds and launches on simulator from /Users/pchordia/Documents/iOS-App-Factory/faveoff/app_build/
App-target test calls a public FaveOffRanking function across the package boundary and gets a correct result back
Throwaway test against the real simulator StoreKit environment loads both product IDs and drives one purchase to an observed Transaction.currentEntitlements transition
PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy exists in the project

tasks.title: FaveOffRanking pure engine: startInsertion/nextPair/applyChoice/applySkip
acceptance_criteria: Zero SwiftData/SwiftUI imports anywhere in the package
Tests cover bounded-insertion ordering, transitivity, duplicate-ID stability, 0/1-item cold start
testTwoSkipFallbackBottomPlacement passes at the pure-engine level

tasks.title: SwiftData container factory (real disk + in-memory seam)
acceptance_criteria: Factory produces a working on-disk container and a working isStoredInMemoryOnly container from the same schema
No view or view model constructs its own ModelContext

tasks.title: Metadata lookup service + offline stub provider
acceptance_criteria: OfflineMetadataProvider never throws and never awaits network
Deterministic initials/color-block output for a given title string
Protocol allows a future remote provider without changing call sites

tasks.title: ContrastValidator: real WCAG relative-luminance formula
acceptance_criteria: contrastRatio/meetsAA implement the real WCAG formula, not an approximation
Numeric test asserts >=4.5:1 body and >=3:1 large-bold against every locked design-token pair

tasks.title: Cross-cutting scaffolding: ToastCenter, AccessibilityIdentifiers, InterruptionReason, privacy manifest helper
acceptance_criteria: ToastCenter can carry a message across a dismiss-back-to-Library transition
AccessibilityIdentifiers enum covers every control named in the design handoff (library list, compare posters, skip, placed keep-going, add save, paywall purchase, toast banner)
buildPrivacyManifest() produces the fields the manifest actually needs, checked by a test not a hand read

tasks.title: Models & schema: Title, Comparison, InsertionContext, versioned schema + migration plan
acceptance_criteria: No @Relationship properties anywhere; all cross-entity links are plain UUIDs
No @Attribute(.unique) on any id
FaveOffMigrationPlan compiles with a single registered schema version
decade is derived from year at read time, never stored

tasks.title: Repositories: Title/Comparison/Insertion, CRUD, atomic applyPositions, cap check
acceptance_criteria: applyPositions is one atomic write per insertion with the bulk shift unanimated
capReached(track:) fires exactly at 25 ranked movies and never blocks further adds
Container opens in both real-disk and in-memory modes against these repositories

tasks.title: InsertionCoordinator: bridges pure engine to persistence, crash/delete safety
acceptance_criteria: InsertionCoordinatorTests.testResumeAfterKillMidInsertion passes
InsertionCoordinatorTests.testDeleteOpponentDuringCompareCancelsCleanly passes
A stale-InsertionContext reconciliation test passes
testTwoSkipFallbackBottomPlacement passes at the coordinator-integration level
Both compared titles are re-fetched by UUID immediately before any choose/skip action executes
rankedIDs are recomputed by position from the repository every step, no pagination

tasks.title: Core Ritual UI: Library, Add Title, Compare, Placed as one shared full-screen flow
acceptance_criteria: Library owns exactly one activeSheet and one activeFlow, never competing presentations
0/1-item cold-start Placed copy is coherent, never a broken '#1 of 1' string
CoreRitualTapCountTests proves 0->3 movies through add->compare->placed->back-to-list with zero unprompted policy screens
Deleting the opposing title mid-Compare shows the toast and returns to Library without a crash
Poster tap targets and CompareDivider read as obviously interactive with no instructional copy needed

tasks.title: List Intelligence: genre/decade filter chips and no-match nudge
acceptance_criteria: No-match filter state shows a nudge, never a blank screen
Filtering never blocks or gates the base ranked list
CoreRitualTapCountTests from T-010 still passes unmodified

tasks.title: Taste Card renderer with resolvingArt gate
acceptance_criteria: Render never fires until every source poster is confirmed loaded, proven against a deliberately slow fake metadata provider
Output is a static Image, safe against later title deletion

tasks.title: Taste Card UI: preview sheet + ShareLink
acceptance_criteria: resolvingArt/ready/renderFailed/sharing states all present
ShareLink export verified under airplane mode
Card legible with brand mark at iMessage-thumbnail scale

tasks.title: StoreKit 2 purchase service: products, purchase, restore, entitlement listener
acceptance_criteria: Automated tests drive product load, purchase, restore, and Transaction.currentEntitlements transitions as the real pass bar
Manual sandbox click-through is documented as a smoke test only, not the acceptance method
startEntitlementListener runs as a persistent launch-time Task, not a one-shot call

tasks.title: Monetization Surfaces UI: TV-lock row, 25-cap banner, paywall sheet, upgrade CTAs
acceptance_criteria: CoreRitualTapCountTests from T-010 is re-run unmodified and green
TV add never blocks or alters movie ranking state
Cap banner appears exactly at the 25th ranked movie and never blocks further adds
Same PaywallView instance used regardless of entry point (tvLock/capReached/toolbarUpgrade)

tasks.title: Accessibility + contrast final gate
acceptance_criteria: Compare and Placed measure >=4.5:1 body / >=3:1 large-bold across the full Dynamic Type range
Every actionable control has a VoiceOver label and a 44x44pt target
No color-only status cues on locked/capped rows

tasks.title: Hardening + release prep: full E2E, full-suite regression re-run, privacy manifest confirmation
acceptance_criteria: EndToEndFlowTests walks add->compare->placed->browse->share, resume-banner recovery, and a forced purchase failure with ranking unaffected
The entire existing test suite (engine, coordinator, contrast, taste-card resolvingArt, monetization regression) is re-run and green, not just the E2E path
Clean build from clean checkout at /Users/pchordia/Documents/iOS-App-Factory/faveoff/app_build/; PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy confirmed present and correct
